title: From wastewater to epidemiological insights: A systematic review of modeling strategies for infectious disease surveillance

L2: Wastewater-based epidemiology has emerged as a key surveillance approach for infectious diseases since 2021
Modeling strategies translate wastewater pathogen concentrations into population-level disease estimates
L3: Systematic review of computational modeling strategies for wastewater-based epidemiological surveillance of infectious diseases, examining approaches to translate pathogen concentrations in wastewater into actionable public health intelligence
